summary: Completed testing of new implementations: (1) Reports page KPIs and (2) Editable invoice form. All features working correctly. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements and flows verified.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor rendering issue on initial load
Hydration warning: span cannot be child of tbody in table (known issue from previous iteration)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/plants - Returns plants for report dropdown
Backend: GET /api/reports/plant/{id}?month=2025-01 - Returns KPI fields (prognosis_kwh, total_kwh, performance_percent, saved_brl)
Backend: POST /api/invoices/upload-pdf-auto with Group A PDF (UC 113577680) - Returns tariff_values.tariff_total_p=2.21079
Backend: POST /api/invoices/upload-pdf-auto with Group A PDF - Returns tariff_values.tariff_total_fp=0.51475
Backend: POST /api/invoices/upload-pdf-auto with Group A PDF - Returns tariff_values.te_p_unit=0.562895
Backend: POST /api/invoices/upload-pdf-auto with Group A PDF - Returns tariff_values.te_fp_unit=0.3503
Backend: POST /api/invoices/upload-pdf-auto - Returns amount_saved_brl=159.07 for UC 113577680
Backend: POST /api/invoices/upload-pdf-auto - Returns energy_compensated_p_kwh=303 and energy_billed_p_kwh=-265 for UC 113577680
Backend: POST /api/invoices/upload-pdf-auto with Group B PDF (UC 102480958) - Parses correctly
Backend: GET /api/invoices - Returns invoice list
Backend: Unauthorized access - Returns 401/403
Frontend: Reports page (/relatorios) loads with data-testid='reports-page'
Frontend: Reports page shows 4 KPIs - PROGNOSTICO, GERACAO DO MES, DESEMPENHO, ECONOMIA
Frontend: Plant dropdown in Reports works correctly
Frontend: Faturas page (/faturas) loads with data-testid='invoices-page'
Frontend: PDF upload triggers editable form (data-testid='invoice-edit-form')
Frontend: Editable form shows all required fields - Valor Faturado, Inicio/Fim Ciclo, Economizado
Frontend: Editable form has FORA PONTA section with all fields
Frontend: Editable form has PONTA section with all fields (for Group A)
Frontend: Back button (data-testid='back-btn') returns to list view
Frontend: Save button (data-testid='save-invoice-btn') present in form
Frontend: Parsed values display correctly - tariff_total_p=2.21079, te_p_unit=0.562895, energy_compensated_p=303, energy_billed_p=-265
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard hydration warning (span in tbody) - not blocking but should be fixed for clean React hydration
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing UC 113577680 associated with Usina FV Bananas Portao
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: (1) Reports page KPIs (Prognostico, Geracao do Mes, Desempenho, Economia) working correctly when plant is selected. (2) Invoice editable form appears after PDF upload with all fields editable including FORA PONTA and PONTA sections. PDF parser correctly extracts tariff_values (tariff_total_p, tariff_total_fp, te_p_unit, te_fp_unit), amount_saved_brl=159.07, energy_compensated_p=303, energy_billed_p=-265. Test PDFs at /tmp/113577680_geradora.pdf (Group A) and /tmp/102480958.pdf (Group B).
